agent.name: Qwen Code
agent.description: Qwen Code through the standard Agent Client Protocol
runtime.install.title: Install the managed Qwen Code runtime
runtime.install.description: Installs the pinned runtime in Tutti's target-scoped managed directory without changing your project.
runtime.authRequired: Choose a provider with interactive /auth or security.auth.selectedType in user settings, then provide its credentials through settings or the corresponding environment variables before starting an ACP session.
